content: Remote OK Creative Director Strange Face <p>**Creative Director ГўВЂВ“ Film Campaign (Kickstarter + Social) ГўВЂВ“ Remote**</p><p><br></p><p>*BUBLIK* is a bilingual psychodrama shot in London, now in post, starring Ksenia Rappoport, with music by Novelist. We're aiming high ГўВЂВ“ major festivals like Sundance and beyond ГўВЂВ“ and we're launching a Kickstarter and social campaign to bring the film into the world. We're looking for a Creative Director who's done this before, for films, and done it well.</p><p><br></p><p>This isn't an entry-level role. We want someone with a track record: campaigns you've led, funding goals you've hit, audiences you've built around a film. If you can point to crowdfunders that worked and social rollouts that actually moved people, we want to talk.</p><p><br></p><p>What you'll own:</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ The creative vision for *BUBLIK*'s social presence and Kickstarter campaign, end to end.</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ The narrative arc of the launch: how we tease, reveal, build, and convert.</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ Content strategy across platforms, working from a strong existing library and a clear visual world.</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ The story we tell backers and audiences, and the way we tell it.</p><p><br></p><p>Who you are:</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ You've run successful film campaigns ГўВЂВ“ Kickstarter or equivalent ГўВЂВ“ and can show the results.</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ You understand how films find their people online, not just how brands sell things.</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ You think like a storyteller and execute like a strategist.</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ You move fast. We have hard deadlines and a film worth fighting for.</p><p><br></p><p>Immediate start. Remote. Paid.</p><p><br></p><p>If this is you, send me a campaign you've led and what it achieved. Show me the work.</p><p><br></p><strong><p>Drop Artem a text: </p><p><br></p><p>Check out Artem FedorovГўВЂВ™s profile on LinkedIn https://uk.linkedin.com/in/artem-fedorov-1305991b9</p></strong> finance, non tech, customer support London, London, England, United Kingdom 2026-06-24T02:13:49+00:00 1133995 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-creative-director-strange-face-1133995 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Social Media Manager Strange Face <strong><p>**Brand &amp; Content Creative (all levels) ГўВЂВ“ Strange Face / Remote**</p><p><br></p><p>Everyone online is being told the same thing: post more. More reels, more carousels, more noise. Most brands obey without ever asking why.</p><p><br></p><p>We think the question holds the answer. AI has made it easier than ever to generate ГўВЂВ“ read: replicate ГўВЂВ“ content. So the thing that cuts through isn't the thing there's more of. It's the thing that tells a story. That carries values, a philosophy, a point of view. The kind people actually feel something about.</p><p><br></p><p>Strange Face is a London-based brand film agency built on exactly that belief. We make cinematic brand films and strategic social content for people who'd rather be remembered than merely seen. We're looking for someone to help shape how we show up online ГўВЂВ“ and to grow with us as we do.</p><p><br></p><p>What you'll do:</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ Own and shape our Instagram. We have a deep library of content ready to go, so you're not starting from a blank page.</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ Build our presence across platforms as we work with film festivals, brands, and companies.</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ Turn our work and our thinking into content people stop scrolling for.</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ Help define the voice of a young agency still deciding exactly who it wants to be.</p><p><br></p><p>Who you are:</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ You think in stories, not just posts. You understand format, rhythm, timing, taste.</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ You can land an idea in a caption, a cut, a thumbnail.</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ You're hungry. This role grows as the agency grows, and we mean that literally ГўВЂВ“ there's real room to rise here.</p><p>ГўВЂВ“ Any level. Early and brilliant? We want you. Experienced and tired of places that don't respect craft? We want you too.</p><p><br></p><p>Fully remote.</p><p><br></p><p>If this is you, send me one thing you've made that someone actually felt something about. Skip the generic cover letter. Show me the work:</p><p><br></p><p>LinkedIn https://uk.linkedin.com/in/artem-fedorov-1305991b9</p></strong> finance, non tech, customer support London, London, England, United Kingdom 2026-06-24T02:06:20+00:00 1133993 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-social-media-manager-strange-face-1133993 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Patient Advocate Cedar <p>Our healthcare system is the leading cause of personal bankruptcy in the U.S. Every year, over 50 million Americans suffer adverse financial consequences as a result of seeking care, from lower credit scores to garnished wages. The challenge is only getting worse, as high deductible health plans are the fastest growing plan design in the U.S.</p><p>CedarГўВЂВ™s mission is to leverage data science, smart product design and personalization to make healthcare more affordable and accessible. Today, healthcare providers still engage with its consumers in a ГўВЂВњone-size-fits-allГўВЂВќ approach; and Cedar is excited to leverage consumer best practices to deliver a superior experience.</p> <p><strong>The Role</strong></p><p>The Patient Advocate position serves as the liaison between the patient and healthcare provider supporting our patients through the following channels: live chat, phone, and email communications. In addition, patient advocates act as account managers to holistically manage the medical billing process and anticipate potential billing issues. We believe that all patients deserve to have a pleasant and efficient healthcare billing experience.</p><p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p><ul><li><span>Manage on average 60-80 incoming and outgoing patient calls regarding medical bills</span></li><li><span>Utilize the Cedar platform to handle all patient questions via inbound chats, phone calls and perform appropriate outbound call campaign</span></li><li><span>Run and follow through on escalations to the healthcare provider</span></li><li><span>Lead the payment posting process and follow up on defaulted payments</span></li><li><span>Appropriately follow up with insurance and other third parties</span></li><li><span>Meet assigned team and individual metrics related to satisfaction and collections performance</span></li></ul><p><strong>Skills and Experience</strong></p><ul><li><span>2-3 years of customer service experience via phone or call center</span></li><li><span>1-2 years of medical billing, insurance or related healthcare experience</span></li><li><span>Experience navigating electronic medical record systems (preferably </span><span>Athena (Centricity Business), eClinicalWorks, Medik, CareVoyant, Nextgen, and Epic)</span></li><li><span>Proficiency in Google Suite</span></li><li><
